category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates TCP tunnels through HTTPS proxies; official README describes connecting stdin/stdout to an origin server through an HTTPS proxy.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is proxytunnel; official GitHub README title is Proxytunnel.
docs_sources: Official README contains usage and links to build docs and man page; official repository has a docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/proxytunnel/proxytunnel, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe TCP/HTTPS proxy tunneling, including SSH usage.
